SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LIBORATO JOSE ROMERO IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMERO, LIBORATO JOSE $9,598.82 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,598.82 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
